shopStepDetail: Tell us how customers should find you. The shop address becomes your public storefront URL.
storefrontStepDetail: Pick a starting template. You can restyle pages and branding later in the editor.
reviewStepDetail: Double-check the essentials. Creating the shop provisions your workspace and storefront.
draftSaved: Progress is saved on this device.
reviewDescription: Confirm these details before we provision the workspace.
recoverableDescription: This setup draft is saved on this device until your shop is created.
shopNameHelp: Shown on invoices, the dashboard, and your storefront.
categoryHelp: Optional. Pick one or more. Helps us tailor defaults later.
contactPhoneHelp: Optional. Used for order and support contact.
templateHelp: Choose the look that is closest to your brand. You can change it later.
title: Set up your first shop
description: Claim your address, choose a starting storefront, and open a workspace built for daily commerce work.
setupDescription: Add the shop details and choose a storefront starting point.
noStorefrontsDescription: Shop setup needs an active storefront template.
whatNextDescription: We create the workspace and storefront starter.
afterSetupDescription: After creation you land in the dashboard. These are the highest-impact next steps.

handle.choose: Pick a short address customers can remember.
handle.checkFailed: Could not check this address. Try again.
handle.invalid: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.

error.authRequired: Sign in to continue setting up your shop.
error.handleTaken: That shop address is already taken. Try another.
error.invalidSetup: Check your shop details and try again.
error.platformUnavailable: We couldn’t reach our servers. Check your connection and try again in a moment.
error.storefrontUnavailable: Shop setup is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
error.templateUnavailable: That storefront option isn’t available. Choose another and try again.
error.invalidResponse: Something went wrong while creating your shop. Please try again.
error.provisioningFailed: We couldn’t finish creating your shop. Please try again in a few minutes. If it keeps happening, contact support.
error.provisioningUnavailable: Shop setup is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
error.commerceCredentials: We couldn’t finish creating your shop. Please try again later or contact support.
error.failed: Something went wrong. Please try again.
